summary: The current `main` branch still chose Telegram polling correctly, but `/start` remained silent on this Windows host because polling used Node HTTPS only and Node/undici timed out to `api.telegram.org` while PowerShell Bot API access still worked. `apps/bot` now falls back to Windows PowerShell for transport-level `deleteWebhook`, `getUpdates`, and `getWebhookInfo` failures, with targeted tests, passing bot verify commands, and a live startup proof on the current machine.
